input.prompt: I need to update and align NuGet package versions across the advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx solution. Can you bump everything to the latest and get them consistent?

arguments.name: explore-nuget-versions
arguments.prompt:
Explore the /tmp/sv-11abccc064b84997b76bee5fab401214/advanced-multi-complexity directory thoroughly. I need to understand ALL NuGet package version definitions and references across this solution.

Please find and show the full contents of:
1. Enterprise.slnx
2. Directory.Build.props
3. Common.props
4. Every .csproj file in all subdirectories (Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web, and any others)
5. Any Directory.Packages.props, nuget.config, or other NuGet-related config files
6. Any other .props or .targets files

For each file, show the complete content. I need to understand:
- Where package versions are defined (properties, inline, Central Package Management, etc.)
- Which packages are used and their current versions
- Any conditional version logic (e.g., multi-targeting conditions)
- How Common.props and Directory.Build.props relate to project files

data.content:
Perfect! I have explored the entire solution. Here's a complete analysis of all NuGet package version definitions and references:

## Complete Solution NuGet Package Analysis

### 1. **Enterprise.slnx** (Solution File)
```xml
<Solution>
  <Project Path="Web\Web.csproj" />
  <Project Path="Api\Api.csproj" />
  <Project Path="Core\Core.csproj" />
  <Project Path="Legacy\Legacy.csproj" />
  <Project Path="Tests\Tests.csproj" />
</Solution>
```

### 2. **Directory.Build.props** (Root-level build properties)
```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <LangVersion>latest</LangVersion>
    <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings>
    <BlobsVersion>12.24.0</BlobsVersion>
    <HostingVersion>8.0.1</HostingVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Import Project="Common.props" />
</Project>
```

### 3. **Common.props** (Shared package references)
```xml
<Project>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="9.0.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### 4. **Api/Api.csproj** (Multi-targeting Web API)
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFrameworks>net8.0;net6.0</TargetFrameworks>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="Azure.Storage.Blobs" Version="$(BlobsVersion)" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(TargetFramework)' == 'net6.0'">
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" Version="6.0.36" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(TargetFramework)' == 'net8.0'">
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" Version="8.0.11" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### 5. **Core/Core.csproj** (Standard Library)
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.0" />
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="$(HostingVersion)" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### 6. **Legacy/Legacy.csproj** (Legacy .NET 6.0 library)
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net6.0</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="8.0.5" />
    <PackageReference Include="Azure.Storage.Blobs" Version="12.19.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### 7. **Tests/Tests.csproj** (Unit tests)
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

### 8. **Web/Web.csproj** (Web application)
```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

## Summary of NuGet Package Version Management:

**Version Definition Strategy:**
- Uses **property-based versioning** for shared packages (BlobsVersion, HostingVersion in Directory.Build.props)
- Uses **direct inline versions** for most packages
- Uses **conditional versioning** for multi-target scenarios (Api.csproj has different NewtonsoftJson versions for net6.0 vs net8.0)
- No Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props) or nuget.config files found

**Key Package Versions:**
| Package | Version(s) | Used In |
|---------|-----------|---------|
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | Common.props (all projects) |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | Core |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.24.0 (property) / 12.19.0 (hardcoded) | Api, Legacy |
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 / 9.0.0 / 8.0.5 | Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web |
| Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 / 8.0.11 | Api (conditional by target) |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | Tests |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | Web |

**Inconsistencies Detected:**
- System.Text.Json: 4 different versions across projects (8.0.5, 9.0.0, 10.0.1)
- Azure.Storage.Blobs: Property defines 12.24.0 but Legacy hardcodes 12.19.0

```xml
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web">

  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup Condition="'$(TargetFramework)' == 'net8.0'">
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" Version="8.0.11" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
```

## Summary of NuGet Package Version Management:

**Version Definition Strategy:**
- Uses **property-based versioning** for shared packages (BlobsVersion, HostingVersion in Directory.Build.props)
- Uses **direct inline versions** for most packages
- Uses **conditional versioning** for multi-target scenarios (Api.csproj has different NewtonsoftJson versions for net6.0 vs net8.0)
- No Central Package Management (Directory.Packages.props) or nuget.config files found

| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 / 9.0.0 / 8.0.5 | Api, Core, Legacy, Tests, Web |
| Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 / 8.0.11 | Api (conditional by target) |
| xunit | 2.9.3 | Tests |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | Web |
